        <!-- Pantalla de carga global -->
        
<!-- Pantalla de carga global -->
<div id="globalLoadingOverlay" class="global-loader-overlay">
    <div class="global-loader-spinner"></div>
</div>

<script type="text/javascript">
    // Mover el overlay al <body> para competir en el mismo stacking context
    // que el popup del ModalPopupExtender (que el Toolkit también mueve al body)
    (function () {
        var el = document.getElementById('globalLoadingOverlay');
        if (el && el.parentNode !== document.body) {
            document.body.appendChild(el);
        }
    })();

    // Control de Pantalla de Carga Global (con delay de 200ms y prevención de doble submit)
    (function () {
        var loaderTimeout = null;
        var safetyTimeout = null;
        var loadingEl = null;
        var doPostBackWrapped = false;

        function getLoader() {
            if (!loadingEl) {
                loadingEl = document.getElementById('globalLoadingOverlay');
            }
            if (loadingEl && loadingEl.parentNode !== document.body) {
                document.body.appendChild(loadingEl);
            }
            return loadingEl;
        }

        function keepLoaderAboveModals(loader) {
            if (!loader) return;
            if (loader.parentNode === document.body) {
                document.body.appendChild(loader);
            }
            loader.style.position = 'fixed';
            loader.style.zIndex = '200020';
        }

        function showLoader() {
            if (loaderTimeout) clearTimeout(loaderTimeout);
            if (safetyTimeout) clearTimeout(safetyTimeout);

            var loader = getLoader();
            if (loader) {
                // Si había un fade-out en curso, cancelarlo
                if (loader._hideTimer) { clearTimeout(loader._hideTimer); loader._hideTimer = null; }
                keepLoaderAboveModals(loader);
                // Bloquear clicks inmediatamente mostrando el overlay de forma transparente
                loader.style.display = 'flex';

                // Mostrar visualmente (blur y spinner) tras un pequeño delay
                loaderTimeout = setTimeout(function () {
                    loader.classList.add('loader-visible');
                    document.documentElement.classList.add('loading-dim');
                }, 150);
            }

            // Timeout de seguridad de 15 segundos
            safetyTimeout = setTimeout(hideLoader, 15000);
        }

        function hideLoader() {
            if (loaderTimeout) clearTimeout(loaderTimeout);
            if (safetyTimeout) clearTimeout(safetyTimeout);
            
            var loader = getLoader();
            if (loader) {
                // Disparar el fade-out (blur/opacidad vuelven a 0) y recién
                // ocultar al terminar la transición -> salida suave pero rápida
                loader.classList.remove('loader-visible');
                document.documentElement.classList.remove('loading-dim');
                if (loader._hideTimer) clearTimeout(loader._hideTimer);
                loader._hideTimer = setTimeout(function () {
                    loader.style.display = 'none';
                    loader._hideTimer = null;
                }, 170);
            }
        }

        function isTrigger(elem) {
            while (elem && elem !== document) {
                if (elem.classList && (
                    elem.classList.contains('trigger-loading') || 
                    elem.classList.contains('sa-trigger-loading')
                )) {
                    return true;
                }
                elem = elem.parentNode;
            }
            return false;
        }

        // 1. Interceptar submit de formulario nativo para prevenir doble submit
        function initFormSubmitLoader() {
            var form = document.getElementById('form1');
            if (form) {
                form.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {
                    if (e.defaultPrevented) return;
                    var submitter = e.submitter || document.activeElement;
                    if (submitter && isTrigger(submitter)) {
                        showLoader();
                    }
                });
            }
        }

        // 2. Interceptar clicks en links de navegación estándar que tengan clase trigger-loading
        function initLinkClickLoader() {
            document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
                if (e.defaultPrevented) return;
                var elem = e.target;
                while (elem && elem !== document) {
                    if (elem.tagName === 'A') {
                        if (elem.classList && (
                            elem.classList.contains('trigger-loading') || 
                            elem.classList.contains('sa-trigger-loading')
                        )) {
                            var href = elem.getAttribute('href');
                            var target = elem.getAttribute('target');
                            
                            // Ignorar nuevas pestañas, anclas, javascript void y protocolos
                            if (target === '_blank') return;
                            if (href && (href.startsWith('#') || href.startsWith('javascript:') || href.startsWith('mailto:') || href.startsWith('tel:'))) {
                                return;
                            }
                            
                            showLoader();
                        }
                        break;
                    }
                    elem = elem.parentNode;
                }
            });
        }

        // 3. Interceptar postbacks programáticos usando __doPostBack
        function wrapDoPostBack() {
            if (doPostBackWrapped) return;
            if (typeof window.__doPostBack === 'function') {
                var originalDoPostBack = window.__doPostBack;
                window.__doPostBack = function (eventTarget, eventArgument) {
                    var elem = document.getElementById(eventTarget) || document.getElementsByName(eventTarget)[0];
                    if (elem && isTrigger(elem)) {
                        showLoader();
                    }
                    originalDoPostBack(eventTarget, eventArgument);
                };
                doPostBackWrapped = true;
            }
        }

        // 4. Integración con postbacks asíncronos AJAX (UpdatePanel)
        function initAjaxLoader() {
            if (typeof Sys !== 'undefined' && Sys.WebForms && Sys.WebForms.PageRequestManager) {
                var prm = Sys.WebForms.PageRequestManager.getInstance();
                prm.remove_beginRequest(onBeginRequest);
                prm.add_beginRequest(onBeginRequest);
                prm.remove_endRequest(onEndRequest);
                prm.add_endRequest(onEndRequest);
            }
            wrapDoPostBack();
        }

        function onBeginRequest(sender, args) {
            var elem = args.get_postBackElement();
            if (elem && isTrigger(elem)) {
                showLoader();
            }
        }

        function onEndRequest() {
            hideLoader();
        }

        // Fallback para transiciones de descarga de página
        window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function () {
            showLoader();
        });

        // Inicializar todos los handlers
        if (typeof Sys !== 'undefined') {
            Sys.Application.add_load(function () {
                initAjaxLoader();
                initFormSubmitLoader();
                initLinkClickLoader();
            });
        } else {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
                initAjaxLoader();
                initFormSubmitLoader();
                initLinkClickLoader();
            });
        }
    })();

    // ======================================================================
    // Preservación global del scroll al guardar.
    // Muchas pantallas guardan con Response.Redirect a la misma URL (con &TabID).
    // Un redirect es una navegación nueva, así que MaintainScrollPositionOnPostBack
    // NO restaura el scroll. Acá guardamos la posición en sessionStorage cuando el
    // que provoca la navegación es un POSTBACK (submit del form / __doPostBack), y
    // la restauramos al recargar la misma página. Las navegaciones por link normal
    // no guardan nada, así que entrar a una pantalla desde otra arranca arriba.
    // ======================================================================
    (function () {
        // Clave por pantalla + identidad del registro (querystring sin TabID, que cambia
        // con el redirect). Así distintos registros (?budget=8365 vs ?budget=8355) no
        // comparten la misma posición de scroll.
        function scrollKey() {
            var qs = (location.search || '').replace(/^\?/, '').split('&').filter(function (p) {
                return p && !/^tabid=/i.test(p);
            }).sort().join('&');
            return 'admScrollRestore:' + location.pathname + (qs ? '?' + qs : '');
        }
        var KEY = scrollKey();
        var isPostingBack = false;

        function currentScroll() {
            return window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || 0;
        }

        function saveScroll() {
            try { sessionStorage.setItem(KEY, String(currentScroll())); } catch (e) {}
        }

        // Marcar postbacks (full): submit nativo del form y __doPostBack programático.
        var form = document.getElementById('form1');
        if (form) {
            form.addEventListener('submit', function () { isPostingBack = true; });
        }
        if (typeof window.__doPostBack === 'function') {
            var _orig = window.__doPostBack;
            window.__doPostBack = function (t, a) { isPostingBack = true; return _orig(t, a); };
        }

        // Al abandonar la página por un postback (incluye el redirect posterior), guardar.
        window.addEventListener('pagehide', function () { if (isPostingBack) saveScroll(); });
        window.addEventListener('beforeunload', function () { if (isPostingBack) saveScroll(); });

        // Restaurar al cargar la misma pantalla.
        function restoreScroll() {
            var v;
            try { v = sessionStorage.getItem(KEY); } catch (e) { v = null; }
            if (v === null) return;
            try { sessionStorage.removeItem(KEY); } catch (e) {}
            var y = parseInt(v, 10) || 0;
            if (y <= 0) return;
            window.scrollTo(0, y);
            requestAnimationFrame(function () { window.scrollTo(0, y); });
            setTimeout(function () { window.scrollTo(0, y); }, 80);
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', restoreScroll);
        } else {
            restoreScroll();
        }
        window.addEventListener('load', restoreScroll);
    })();
</script>

        <!-- Popup global de ajuste/recorte de imagen -->
        



<style>
    /* Overlay + card autosuficientes (el modal se mueve al <body> al abrir, por
       eso no dependemos de las clases #form1 .modal-*; replicamos lo necesario). */
    #imgCropModal {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        z-index: 100050;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.45);
        visibility: hidden;
        opacity: 0;
        transition: opacity .15s ease-out;
    }
    #imgCropModal.show { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; }

    #imgCropModal .img-crop-dialog {
        width: 390px;
        max-width: 92vw;
        margin: 0;
        /* Fijar el diálogo al centro del viewport (el overlay ya está en <body>),
           mismo patrón que el modal de "Extender tarifas" en hotels/Default.aspx;
           el centrado solo-por-flex del overlay no alcanza en esta app. */
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        max-height: 90vh;
        overflow-y: auto;   /* seguridad en pantallas bajas; el contenido mide ~520px */
    }

    #imgCropModal .modal-card {
        background: #fff;
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
        border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        overflow: hidden;
    }
    #imgCropModal .modal-card-header {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        padding: 12px 16px;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #ececec;
    }
    #imgCropModal .modal-card-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #333; margin: 0; }
    #imgCropModal .modal-card-close {
        background: transparent; border: none; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1;
        color: #777; cursor: pointer; padding: 0;
    }
    #imgCropModal .modal-card-body { padding: 16px; font-size: 14px; color: #444; }
    #imgCropModal .modal-card-footer {
        display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px;
        padding: 10px 16px; background: #f8f8f8; border-top: 1px solid #e6e6e6;
    }

    /* Botones autosuficientes (primario / secundario) */
    #imgCropModal .modal-card-footer button {
        height: 34px; padding: 0 18px; border-radius: 8px;
        font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer;
        border: 1px solid transparent; transition: all .15s ease;
    }
    #imgCropModal .btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #475569; border-color: #cbd5e1; }
    #imgCropModal .btn-secondary:hover { background: #f1f5f9; }
    #imgCropModal .btn-primary {
        background: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        color: var(--color-secondary, #1a1a1a);
        border-color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
    }
    #imgCropModal .btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(0.95); }

    /* Dark mode del card (el modal está fuera de #form1, por eso targeteamos html.dark) */
    html.dark #imgCropModal .modal-card { background: #1e2530; border-color: #374151; }
    html.dark #imgCropModal .modal-card-header { background: #1e2530; border-bottom-color: #374151; }
    html.dark #imgCropModal .modal-card-title { color: #e5e7eb; }
    html.dark #imgCropModal .modal-card-footer { background: #161b22; border-top-color: #374151; }

    #imgCropModal .img-crop-stage {
        position: relative;
        width: 323px;
        height: 230px;           /* mismo aspecto que la web (323x230) */
        max-width: 86vw;
        margin: 6px auto 20px;
        border-radius: 16px;
        overflow: hidden;
        background: #0f172a;
        box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.18);
        touch-action: none;
        cursor: grab;
        user-select: none;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-crop-stage.is-dragging { cursor: grabbing; }
    #imgCropModal .img-crop-canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }

    /* Marco/recuadro guía sobre la imagen */
    #imgCropModal .img-crop-ring {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        pointer-events: none;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 1.5px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4) inset;
        border-radius: 16px;
    }

    #imgCropModal .img-crop-controls {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 14px;
    }

    /* Botones +/- de zoom (clickeables) */
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-btn {
        width: 34px;
        height: 34px;
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 50%;
        border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #e2e8f0);
        background: #fff;
        color: #475569;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: transform .12s ease, background-color .15s ease, color .15s ease, border-color .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-btn i { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1; }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-btn:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #eab308) 8%, #fff);
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-btn:active { transform: scale(0.92); }

    /* Control de zoom: un "scrubber" donde se agarra la pastilla (handle) y se
       arrastra para mover el zoom. No importa dónde se haga clic en la barra:
       siempre se toma el componente y el movimiento es relativo. La pastilla
       muestra el % de zoom actual. */
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-scrubber {
        flex: 1 1 auto;
        max-width: 280px;
        height: 40px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        position: relative;
        padding: 0 28px;            /* margen para que la pastilla no se corte en los extremos */
        cursor: grab;
        outline: none;
        touch-action: none;
        user-select: none;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-scrubber.is-grabbing { cursor: grabbing; }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-scrubber:focus-visible .img-zoom-track {
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #eab308) 22%, transparent);
    }

    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-track {
        position: relative;
        width: 100%;
        height: 8px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--track-bg, #e2e8f0);
        transition: box-shadow .15s ease;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-fill {
        position: absolute;
        top: 0; left: 0; bottom: 0;
        width: 0;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        pointer-events: none;
    }

    /* Pastilla que se agarra y muestra el % de zoom */
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-handle {
        position: absolute;
        top: 50%;
        left: 0;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        height: 28px;
        min-width: 56px;
        padding: 0 11px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 4px;
        border-radius: 999px;
        background: #fff;
        border: 1.5px solid var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        /* color fijo oscuro: la pastilla es blanca y --color-secondary puede ser
           claro/blanco según el tema (dejaría el número invisible). */
        color: #334155;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
        line-height: 1;
        white-space: nowrap;
        box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.22);
        cursor: grab;
        transition: transform .12s ease, box-shadow .15s ease;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-handle i { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; color: var(--color-primary, #eab308); }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-scrubber:hover .img-zoom-handle { box-shadow: 0 5px 14px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.28); }
    #imgCropModal .img-zoom-scrubber.is-grabbing .img-zoom-handle {
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.06);
        box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.32);
    }

    #imgCropModal .img-crop-controls.is-disabled { opacity: 0.4; pointer-events: none; }

    /* Presets de encuadre (Llenar / Ajustar / Estirar) */
    #imgCropModal .img-crop-fit {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 6px;
        margin: 2px 0 14px;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-fit-btn {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 5px;
        padding: 5px 12px;
        font-size: 12px;
        font-weight: 600;
        border-radius: 999px;
        border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #e2e8f0);
        background: #fff;
        color: #475569;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: background-color .15s ease, color .15s ease, border-color .15s ease;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-fit-btn i { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; }
    #imgCropModal .img-fit-btn:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-fit-btn.is-active {
        background: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        border-color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        color: var(--color-secondary, #1a1a1a);
    }
    html.dark #imgCropModal .img-fit-btn {
        background: var(--color-surface);
        border-color: var(--color-border);
        color: var(--color-text-muted);
    }
    html.dark #imgCropModal .img-fit-btn.is-active {
        color: var(--color-secondary, #1a1a1a);
    }

    #imgCropModal .img-crop-hint {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 4px;
        font-size: 11.5px;
        color: #94a3b8;
        margin: 14px 0 2px;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-crop-hint-line {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: 5px;
    }
    #imgCropModal .img-crop-hint i { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; opacity: 0.85; vertical-align: middle; }
    #imgCropModal .img-crop-hint-dot { opacity: 0.5; margin: 0 2px; }

    html.dark #imgCropModal .img-zoom-btn { background: var(--color-surface); border-color: var(--color-border); color: var(--color-text-muted); }
    html.dark #imgCropModal .img-zoom-track { background: #374151; }
    html.dark #imgCropModal .img-zoom-handle {
        background: #1e2530;
        color: var(--color-text, #e5e7eb);
        border-color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
    }

    /* ======================================================================
       Overlay de acciones que aparece SOLO al hacer hover sobre la imagen:
       arriba-derecha el botón de ampliar; abajo-centro Seleccionar/Editar/Borrar.
       ====================================================================== */
    #form1 .image-preview-overlay { display: none !important; }
    #form1 .image-preview-box-lg, #form1 .image-preview-box { position: relative; }

    #form1 .img-hover-overlay {
        position: absolute;
        inset: 0;
        z-index: 6;
        opacity: 0;
        visibility: hidden;
        pointer-events: none;
        transition: opacity .16s ease, visibility .16s ease;
        background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,0.30) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 32%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 52%, rgba(0,0,0,0.48) 100%);
    }
    #form1 .image-preview-wrapper:hover .img-hover-overlay,
    #form1 .image-preview-wrapper:focus-within .img-hover-overlay { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; }
    #form1 .image-preview-wrapper.is-empty .img-hover-overlay { display: none; }

    #form1 .img-actions-row {
        position: absolute;
        left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 8px;
        display: flex;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 8px;
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    #form1 .img-action-fab {
        pointer-events: auto;
        width: 30px;
        height: 30px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95);
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
        box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
        color: #475569;
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: transform .15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow .15s ease, background-color .15s ease, color .15s ease;
    }
    #form1 .img-action-fab i { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1; }
    #form1 .img-action-fab:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); }
    #form1 .img-action-select:hover,
    #form1 .img-action-edit:hover { color: var(--color-primary, #eab308); }
    #form1 .img-action-delete:hover { color: #dc2626; background: #fff; }

    /* Botón ampliar (arriba a la derecha) */
    #form1 .img-expand-btn {
        position: absolute;
        top: 8px; right: 8px;
        pointer-events: auto;
        width: 30px;
        height: 30px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 8px;
        background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.55);
        border: none;
        color: #fff;
        cursor: pointer;
        backdrop-filter: blur(2px);
        transition: background-color .15s ease, transform .15s ease;
    }
    #form1 .img-expand-btn i { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1; }
    #form1 .img-expand-btn:hover { background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.78); transform: scale(1.06); }

    /* Sin imagen: editar/borrar/ampliar no aplican */
    #form1 .image-preview-wrapper.is-empty .img-action-edit,
    #form1 .image-preview-wrapper.is-empty .img-action-delete { display: none; }

    /* ======================================================================
       Empty state del componente de imagen (cuando no hay imagen cargada).
       Look minimalista 2026: superficie suave, borde punteado, ícono en tile
       redondeado y micro-interacción al hover. Clickeable para elegir imagen.
       ====================================================================== */
    #form1 .image-preview-wrapper.is-empty .image-preview-overlay { display: none !important; }

    #form1 .image-preview-box-lg.is-empty,
    #form1 .image-preview-box.is-empty {
        cursor: pointer;
        border: 1.5px dashed var(--color-border, #cbd5e1);
        background: radial-gradient(135% 135% at 50% 0%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #eab308) 7%, #fff) 0%, #fff 62%);
        transition: border-color .18s ease, background .18s ease, transform .18s ease, box-shadow .18s ease;
    }

    #form1 .image-preview-box-lg.is-empty:hover,
    #form1 .image-preview-box.is-empty:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        box-shadow: 0 8px 20px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #eab308) 16%, transparent);
        transform: translateY(-1px);
    }

    #form1 .image-preview-box-lg.is-empty img,
    #form1 .image-preview-box.is-empty img { display: none; }

    #form1 .img-empty-state {
        display: none;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: 9px;
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        padding: 10px;
        text-align: center;
        pointer-events: none;
    }
    #form1 .image-preview-box-lg.is-empty .img-empty-state,
    #form1 .image-preview-box.is-empty .img-empty-state { display: flex; }

    #form1 .img-empty-icon {
        width: 42px;
        height: 42px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 13px;
        background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #eab308) 13%, #fff);
        color: var(--color-primary, #eab308);
        transition: transform .18s cubic-bezier(0.2, 0.7, 0.2, 1);
    }
    #form1 .img-empty-icon i { font-size: 21px; line-height: 1; }
    #form1 .image-preview-box-lg.is-empty:hover .img-empty-icon,
    #form1 .image-preview-box.is-empty:hover .img-empty-icon { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.06); }

    #form1 .img-empty-text { font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #475569; line-height: 1.2; }
    #form1 .img-empty-sub { font-size: 10px; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.2; }

    /* Thumb "sin imagen" para grillas: solo el ícono del empty state, sin recuadro.
       60x45 = tamaño de los thumbs reales de grilla (#form1 table td > img, tables.css). */
    #form1 .img-thumb-empty {
        width: 60px;
        height: 45px;
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        vertical-align: middle;
    }
    #form1 .img-thumb-empty .img-empty-icon { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 10px; }
    #form1 .img-thumb-empty .img-empty-icon i { font-size: 17px; }

    /* El backend todavía manda su placeholder (no_image.png, etc.) como src; hasta
       que admin-grids.js lo reemplaza por .img-thumb-empty el browser alcanzaba a
       pintar la imagen placeholder clara (se notaba sobre todo en dark mode).
       Mismos patrones que EMPTY_SRC_RE. */
    #form1 table.tablestyle td img[src*="no_image" i],
    #form1 table.tablestyle td img[src*="no-image" i],
    #form1 table.tablestyle td img[src*="noimage" i],
    #form1 table.tablestyle td img[src*="default_letter" i],
    #form1 table.tablestyle td img[src*="default-letter" i],
    #form1 table.tablestyle td img[src*="sin_imagen" i],
    #form1 table.tablestyle td img[src*="sin-imagen" i],
    #form1 table.tablestyle td img[src*="placeholder" i] {
        visibility: hidden;
    }

    /* Dark mode */
    html.dark #form1 .image-preview-box-lg.is-empty,
    html.dark #form1 .image-preview-box.is-empty {
        background: var(--color-surface-alt);
        border-color: var(--color-border);
    }
    html.dark #form1 .img-empty-icon {
        background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #eab308) 22%, transparent);
    }
    html.dark #form1 .img-empty-text { color: var(--color-text); }

    /* ======================================================================
       Lightbox para ver la imagen ORIGINAL (calidad real) al ampliar.
       ====================================================================== */
    #imgLightbox {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        z-index: 100060;
        display: none;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.82);
        padding: 32px;
        cursor: zoom-out;
    }
    #imgLightbox.show { display: flex; }
    #imgLightbox img {
        /* Fijar al centro del viewport (el lightbox ya está en <body>); el centrado
           solo-por-flex del overlay no alcanza en esta app, igual que el modal. */
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        max-width: 94vw;
        max-height: 90vh;
        border-radius: 10px;
        box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
        background: #fff;
        cursor: zoom-out;   /* clic en la imagen cierra el lightbox */
    }
    #imgLightbox .img-lightbox-close {
        position: absolute;
        top: 18px; right: 22px;
        width: 40px; height: 40px;
        display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
        border: none; color: #fff; font-size: 22px; cursor: pointer;
        transition: background-color .15s ease;
    }
    #imgLightbox .img-lightbox-close:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25); }
</style>

<div class="modal-overlay" id="imgCropModal" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="modal-dialog-sm img-crop-dialog">
        <div class="modal-card">
            <div class="modal-card-header">
                <span class="modal-card-title">Ajustar imagen</span>
                <button type="button" class="modal-card-close" data-imgcrop-cancel>&times;</button>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-card-body" style="text-align: center;">
                <div class="img-crop-stage">
                    <canvas class="img-crop-canvas"></canvas>
                    <div class="img-crop-ring"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="img-crop-fit">
                    <button type="button" class="img-fit-btn is-active" data-fit="cover" title="Llena el recuadro (recorta lo que sobra)"><i class="ph ph-frame-corners"></i>Llenar</button>
                    <button type="button" class="img-fit-btn" data-fit="contain" title="Muestra la imagen completa (puede dejar bordes)"><i class="ph ph-corners-out"></i>Ajustar</button>
                    <button type="button" class="img-fit-btn" data-fit="stretch" title="Estira para llenar (puede deformar la imagen)"><i class="ph ph-arrows-out-cardinal"></i>Estirar</button>
                </div>
                <div class="img-crop-controls">
                    <button type="button" class="img-zoom-btn" data-zoom-step="-1" title="Alejar"><i class="ph ph-minus"></i></button>
                    <div class="img-zoom-scrubber" tabindex="0" role="slider" aria-label="Zoom"
                         aria-valuemin="100" aria-valuemax="400" aria-valuenow="100"
                         title="Arrastrá para ajustar el zoom">
                        <div class="img-zoom-track">
                            <div class="img-zoom-fill"></div>
                            <div class="img-zoom-handle">
                                <i class="ph ph-arrows-left-right"></i>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <button type="button" class="img-zoom-btn" data-zoom-step="1" title="Acercar"><i class="ph ph-plus"></i></button>
                </div>
                <div class="img-crop-hint">
                    <span class="img-crop-hint-line"><i class="ph ph-mouse-scroll"></i> usá la rueda o arrastrá la pastilla para el zoom</span>
                    <span class="img-crop-hint-line"><i class="ph ph-arrows-out-cardinal"></i> Arrastrá para reposicionar</span>
                </div>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-card-footer">
                <button type="button" class="btn-secondary" data-imgcrop-cancel>Cancelar</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-primary" data-imgcrop-save>Guardar</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>


<div id="imgLightbox" aria-hidden="true">
    <button type="button" class="img-lightbox-close" title="Cerrar">&times;</button>
    <img alt="Imagen ampliada" />
</div>

<script src="/Administration/Js/features/admin-image-cropper.js?v=1.0.5"></script>


        <!-- Popup global de confirmación (data-confirm / AdvisorConfirm) -->
        



<style>
    #confirmDialog {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        z-index: 100070;               /* por encima del cropper (100050) y su lightbox (100060) */
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        background: rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.45);
        visibility: hidden;
        opacity: 0;
        transition: opacity .15s ease-out;
    }
    #confirmDialog.show { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; }

    /* Tarjeta centrada y compacta. El centrado solo-por-flex del overlay no
       alcanza en esta app (mismo patrón que ImageCropper): fijamos la tarjeta al
       centro del viewport con position:fixed + translate. Especificidad id+clase
       gana sobre el .confirm-box-card global de modal.css. */
    #confirmDialog .confirm-box-card {
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        width: 340px;
        max-width: 92vw;
        margin: 0;
        box-sizing: border-box;
        /* respaldo visual por si modal.css no estuviera disponible */
        background: #fff;
        border-radius: 12px;
        box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
        border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
        padding: 22px 24px;
        text-align: center;
    }
    html.dark #confirmDialog .confirm-box-card {
        background: #1e2530;
        border-color: #374151;
    }

    /* Icono superior (contexto de la acción destructiva). */
    #confirmDialog .confirm-box-icon {
        width: 46px;
        height: 46px;
        margin: 0 auto 12px;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: color-mix(in srgb, #ef4444 12%, #fff);
        color: #ef4444;
    }
    #confirmDialog .confirm-box-icon i { font-size: 24px; line-height: 1; }
    html.dark #confirmDialog .confirm-box-icon {
        background: color-mix(in srgb, #ef4444 22%, transparent);
    }

    /* Botón destructivo (rojo) para confirmaciones de borrado. */
    #confirmDialog .confirm-btn-danger {
        background: #ef4444;
        color: #fff;
        border-color: #ef4444;
    }
    #confirmDialog .confirm-btn-danger:hover { background: #dc2626; }
</style>

<div id="confirmDialog" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="confirm-box-card">
        <div class="confirm-box-icon"><i class="ph ph-warning"></i></div>
        <div class="confirm-box-text" id="confirmDialogText">¿Confirmás la acción?</div>
        <div class="confirm-box-actions">
            <button type="button" class="confirm-btn confirm-btn-secondary" data-confirm-cancel>Cancelar</button>
            <button type="button" class="confirm-btn confirm-btn-danger" data-confirm-ok>Eliminar</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script type="text/javascript">
    (function () {
        var modal, textEl, okBtn, cancelBtn, iconWrap;
        var pending = null;   // { onConfirm, onCancel }

        // Mover el modal al <body> garantiza el centrado por position:fixed (no
        // depende de un ancestro con transform/filter). Preservamos las variables
        // de tema (definidas en #form1) para que los botones conserven el color.
        function relocateToBody() {
            if (!modal || modal.parentNode === document.body) return;
            var form = document.getElementById('form1');
            if (form) {
                var cs = getComputedStyle(form);
                var prim = cs.getPropertyValue('--color-primary');
                var sec = cs.getPropertyValue('--color-secondary');
                if (prim) modal.style.setProperty('--color-primary', prim.trim());
                if (sec) modal.style.setProperty('--color-secondary', sec.trim());
            }
            document.body.appendChild(modal);
        }

        function openModal() {
            relocateToBody();
            modal.classList.add('show');
            modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
        }
        function closeModal() {
            modal.classList.remove('show');
            modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        }

        function finish(confirmed) {
            var cb = pending ? (confirmed ? pending.onConfirm : pending.onCancel) : null;
            pending = null;
            closeModal();
            if (typeof cb === 'function') cb();
        }

        window.AdvisorConfirm = window.AdvisorConfirm || {};
        window.AdvisorConfirm.show = function (opts) {
            opts = opts || {};
            if (!modal) init();
            if (!modal) return;
            pending = { onConfirm: opts.onConfirm, onCancel: opts.onCancel };
            textEl.textContent = opts.message || '¿Confirmás la acción?';
            okBtn.textContent = opts.confirmText || 'Aceptar';
            cancelBtn.textContent = opts.cancelText || 'Cancelar';
            var danger = opts.danger !== false;     // por defecto destructivo (rojo)
            okBtn.classList.toggle('confirm-btn-danger', danger);
            okBtn.classList.toggle('confirm-btn-primary', !danger);
            iconWrap.style.display = danger ? '' : 'none';
            openModal();
            try { okBtn.focus(); } catch (e) {}
        };

        // Reejecuta la acción original del elemento (postback del LinkButton/Button).
        // Para LinkButton el postback viaja en el href "javascript:__doPostBack(...)".
        function reFire(el) {
            if (el.tagName === 'A') {
                var href = el.getAttribute('href') || '';
                var m = href.match(/^javascript:(.*)$/i);
                if (m && m[1]) { try { (0, eval)(m[1]); return; } catch (err) {} }
            }
            el.setAttribute('data-confirm-bypass', '1');   // evita re-interceptar el click nativo
            try { el.click(); } catch (e) {}
            el.removeAttribute('data-confirm-bypass');
        }

        function init() {
            modal = document.getElementById('confirmDialog');
            if (!modal || modal.__confirmInit) return;
            modal.__confirmInit = true;

            textEl = modal.querySelector('#confirmDialogText');
            okBtn = modal.querySelector('[data-confirm-ok]');
            cancelBtn = modal.querySelector('[data-confirm-cancel]');
            iconWrap = modal.querySelector('.confirm-box-icon');

            relocateToBody();

            okBtn.addEventListener('click', function () { finish(true); });
            cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', function () { finish(false); });
            modal.addEventListener('click', function (e) { if (e.target === modal) finish(false); });
            document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
                if (e.key === 'Escape' && modal.classList.contains('show')) finish(false);
            });
        }

        // Interceptor global: cualquier elemento con [data-confirm] abre el popup.
        document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            var el = e.target && e.target.closest ? e.target.closest('[data-confirm]') : null;
            if (!el || el.getAttribute('data-confirm-bypass') === '1') return; // ya confirmado
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
            if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) e.stopImmediatePropagation();
            window.AdvisorConfirm.show({
                message: el.getAttribute('data-confirm') || '¿Confirmás la acción?',
                confirmText: el.getAttribute('data-confirm-yes') || 'Eliminar',
                cancelText: el.getAttribute('data-confirm-no') || 'Cancelar',
                danger: el.getAttribute('data-confirm-danger') !== '0',
                onConfirm: function () { reFire(el); }
            });
        }, true);

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
        } else {
            init();
        }
        if (typeof Sys !== 'undefined' && Sys.Application) {
            Sys.Application.add_load(init);
        }
    })();
</script>

                            <tr>
                                <td class="adminTitle">
                                    
<span id="ctl00_cph1_mainTabContainer_pnlDetails_lblReminderDate_lblValue" title="Fecha de Recordatorio">Fecha de Recordatorio</span>
                                </td>
                                <td class="adminData">
                                    <div id="ctl00_cph1_mainTabContainer_pnlDetails_ctrlReminderDate_datePickerContainer" class="date-picker-container" style="width:250px;">
    <input name="ctl00$cph1$mainTabContainer$pnlDetails$ctrlReminderDate$txtDateTime" type="text" id="ctl00_cph1_mainTabContainer_pnlDetails_ctrlReminderDate_txtDateTime" class="date-input js-datepicker" autocomplete="off" placeholder="dd/mm/aaaa" style="text-align: left !important;" />
    
    <span id="ctl00_cph1_mainTabContainer_pnlDetails_ctrlReminderDate_btnCalendar" class="calendar-icon">
        <i class="ph ph-calendar-blank"></i>
    </span>
</div>

<style>
   .date-picker-container {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        width: 120px;
        height: 32px;
        background-color: #fff;
        border: 1px solid var(--grid-border, #e2e8f0);
        border-radius: 6px;
        padding: 0px 10px;
        box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    .date-picker-container:focus-within {
        border-color: var(--color-primary, #eab308) !important;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary, #eab308) 15%, transparent) !important;
    }

    .date-picker-container:has(.date-input.input-invalid) {
        border-color: #ef4444 !important;
        background-color: #fef2f2 !important;
        box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.12) !important;
    }

    .date-input {
        flex-grow: 1;
        border: none !important;
        background: transparent !important;
        padding: 0 !important;
        margin: 0 !important;
        font-size: 13px;
        color: #111827;
        outline: none !important;
        height: 100% !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
        width: 100% !important;
    }

    .date-input:focus {
        border: none !important;
        background: transparent !important;
        outline: none !important;
        box-shadow: none !important;
    }

    .date-input::placeholder {
        color: #9ca3af;
    }

    .calendar-icon {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        cursor: pointer;
        color: #6b7280; 
        font-size: 20px; 
        margin-left: 8px;
        transition: color 0.2s;
    }

    .calendar-icon:hover {
        color: var(--color-primary, #eab308); 
    }

    /* Disabled State styling using :has() selector */
    .date-picker-container:has(.date-input:disabled) {
        background-color: #f3f4f6 !important;
        border-color: #e5e7eb !important;
        cursor: not-allowed !important;
    }

    .date-picker-container:has(.date-input:disabled) .calendar-icon {
        color: #9ca3af !important;
        cursor: not-allowed !important;
        pointer-events: none !important;
    }
</style>

                                </td>
                            </tr>
                             <tr>
                                <td class="adminTitle">
                                    
<span id="ctl00_cph1_mainTabContainer_pnlDetails_ToolTipLabel1_lblValue" title="Mostrar Presentación">Mostrar Presentación</span>
